query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.departamentoId, u.leaderId, u.status, d.name as deptoNome FROM users u LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON u.departamentoId = d.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%RAFAEL%' OR u.name LIKE '%Rafael%'
